glosses.ja: 預ける; 打ち明ける

sentences.target: Je te confie mes clés ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tə kɔ̃fi me kle sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je te confie mes clés ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tə kɔ̃fi me kle sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I’m trusting you with my keys tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche te confío mis llaves.
translations.de: Ich vertraue dir heute Abend meine Schlüssel an.
translations.it: Stasera ti affido le mie chiavi.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 너에게 내 열쇠를 맡길게.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我把钥匙交给你保管。
translations.yue: 今晚我把鎖匙交畀你保管。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером я доверю тебе свои ключи.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vou deixar minhas chaves com você.
translations.he: הלילה אני מפקיד אצלך את המפתחות שלי.
translations.tr: Bu gece anahtarlarımı sana emanet ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi nhờ bạn giữ chìa khóa của tôi.
translations.nl: Vanavond vertrouw ik je mijn sleutels toe.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері я довірю тобі свої ключі.
translations.hu: Ma este rád bízom a kulcsaimat.
translations.hi: आज रात मैं तुम्हें अपनी चाबियाँ सौंपूँगा.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem powierzę ci moje klucze.
translations.el: Απόψε θα σου εμπιστευτώ τα κλειδιά μου.
translations.nb: I kveld betror jeg deg nøklene mine.
translations.id: Malam ini aku titipkan kunciku padamu.
translations.sv: Ikväll anförtro jag dig mina nycklar.
translations.ro: În seara asta îți încredințez cheile mele.
translations.cs: Dnes večer ti svěřím své klíče.
translations.da: I aften betror jeg dig mine nøgler.
translations.fi: Tänä iltana annan avaimeni sinun haltuusi.
translations.ja: 今夜、鍵をあなたに預けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Clitic indirect object pronoun, 2nd person singular; corresponds to 'à toi' with 'confier'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object and an indirect recipient.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor, plural form; modifies 'clés'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'confie'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'soir' to indicate the current/near time.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement.

sentences.target: On lui confie le chat pendant nos vacances.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ lɥi kɔ̃fi lə ʃa pɑ̃dɑ̃ no vakɑ̃s/

translations.fr: On lui confie le chat pendant nos vacances.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ lɥi kɔ̃fi lə ʃa pɑ̃dɑ̃ no vakɑ̃s/
translations.en: We’re trusting him with the cat during our vacation.
translations.es: Le confiamos el gato durante nuestras vacaciones.
translations.de: Wir vertrauen ihm während unseres Urlaubs die Katze an.
translations.it: Gli affidiamo il gatto durante le nostre vacanze.
translations.ko: 휴가 동안 고양이를 그에게 맡길 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们度假时把猫交给他照看。
translations.yue: 我哋度假期間將隻貓交畀佢照顧。
translations.ru: На время нашего отпуска мы доверим ihm kotа.
translations.pt: Durante as férias, deixamos o gato com ele.
translations.he: במהלך החופשה שלנו אנחנו מפקידים אצלו את החתול.
translations.tr: Tatilimiz boyunca kediyi ona emanet ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Trong kỳ nghỉ, chúng tôi nhờ anh ấy trông con mèo.
translations.nl: Tijdens onze vakantie vertrouwen we de kat aan hem toe.
translations.uk: Під час нашої відпустки ми довіряємо йому кота.
translations.hu: A nyaralásunk alatt rá bízzuk a macskánkat.
translations.hi: हम छुट्टियों में बिल्ली उसकी देखभाल के लिए उसे सौंपते हैं.
translations.el: Κατά τη διάρκεια των διακοπών μας του εμπιστευόμαστε τη γάτα.
translations.nb: Under ferien vår betror vi ham katten.
translations.id: Selama liburan, kami menitipkan kucing padanya.
translations.sv: Under vår semester anförtro vi honom katten.
translations.cs: Během naší dovolené mu svěříme kočku.
translations.da: Under vores ferie betror vi ham katten.
translations.fi: Lomamme aikana annamme kissamme hänen hoitoonsa.
translations.ja: 休暇の間、彼に猫を預けます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun used as subject, grammatically 3rd person singular.
Clitic indirect object pronoun, 3rd person singular; recipient of 'confier'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'on'.
Definite article; introduces 'chat' as direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'confie'.
Preposition; introduces a temporal complement.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural possessor, plural form; modifies 'vacances'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'pendant'.

sentences.target: Ils vont confier le dossier à Marie demain.
sentences.reading: /il vɔ̃ kɔ̃fje lə dosje a maʁi dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils vont confier le dossier à Marie demain.
translations.ipa: /il vɔ̃ kɔ̃fje lə dosje a maʁi dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: They’re going to give the file to Marie tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana le confiarán el expediente a Marie.
translations.de: Sie werden Marie morgen die Akte anvertrauen.
translations.it: Domani affideranno il fascicolo a Marie.
translations.ko: 그들은 내일 서류를 마리에게 맡길 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们明天会把文件交给玛丽保管。
translations.yue: 佢哋聽日會將份文件交畀瑪麗保管。
translations.pt: Amanhã vão confiar o dossiê à Marie.
translations.he: מחר הם ימסרו את התיק למרי.
translations.vi: Ngày mai họ sẽ giao hồ sơ cho Marie.
translations.nl: Morgen vertrouwen ze het dossier aan Marie toe.
translations.hi: कल वे फ़ाइल मैरी को सौंपेंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα εμπιστευτούν τον φάκελο στη Marie.
translations.nb: I morgen betror de mappen til Marie.
translations.id: Besok mereka akan menitipkan berkas kepada Marie.
translations.sv: I morgon kommer de att anförtro mappen åt Marie.
translations.ro: Mâine îi vor încredința dosarul lui Marie.
translations.da: I morgen betror de mappen til Marie.
translations.fi: Huomenna he antavat kansion Marielle haltuun.
translations.ja: 明日、彼らは書類をマリーに預けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; masculine/mixed group.
Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative, 3rd person plural; forms near future with an infinitive.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of 'aller' in near-future construction.
Definite article; introduces 'dossier' as direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'confier'.
Preposition; marks the indirect object (recipient).
Proper noun; indirect object complement introduced by 'à'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the whole proposition/verb phrase.

sentences.target: Nous confions nos enfants à la voisine.
sentences.reading: /nu kɔ̃fjɔ̃ no zɑ̃fɑ̃ a la vwazin/

translations.fr: Nous confions nos enfants à la voisine.
translations.ipa: /nu kɔ̃fjɔ̃ no zɑ̃fɑ̃ a la vwazin/
translations.en: We trust the neighbor with our children.
translations.es: Dejamos a nuestros hijos al cuidado de la vecina.
translations.de: Wir vertrauen unsere Kinder der Nachbarin an.
translations.it: Affidiamo i nostri figli alla vicina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把孩子托付给邻居。
translations.yue: 我哋將小朋友交畀女鄰居照顧。
translations.pt: Deixamos nossos filhos aos cuidados da vizinha.
translations.he: אנחנו מפקידים את הילדים שלנו אצל השכנה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi gửi con cho cô hàng xóm trông.
translations.nl: We vertrouwen onze kinderen toe aan de buurvrouw.
translations.hi: हम अपने बच्चों को पड़ोसिन के सुपुर्द करते हैं.
translations.el: Εμπιστευόμαστε τα παιδιά μας στη γειτόνισσα.
translations.nb: Vi betror barna våre til naboen.
translations.id: Kami menitipkan anak-anak kami kepada tetangga perempuan.
translations.sv: Vi anförtro våra barn åt grannkvinnan.
translations.da: Vi betror vores børn til naboen.
translations.ja: 私たちは子どもたちを近所の女性に預けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb taking DO and IO.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural possessor, plural form; modifies 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural (typically masculine generic); direct object of 'confions'.
Preposition; introduces the indirect object (recipient).
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'voisine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; indirect object recipient introduced by 'à'.

es: Esta noche te confío mis llaves.
Le confiamos el gato durante nuestras vacaciones.
Mañana le confiarán el expediente a Marie.
Dejamos a nuestros hijos al cuidado de la vecina.
de: Ich vertraue dir heute Abend meine Schlüssel an.
Wir vertrauen ihm während unseres Urlaubs die Katze an.
Sie werden Marie morgen die Akte anvertrauen.
Wir vertrauen unsere Kinder der Nachbarin an.
it: Stasera ti affido le mie chiavi.
Gli affidiamo il gatto durante le nostre vacanze.
Domani affideranno il fascicolo a Marie.
Affidiamo i nostri figli alla vicina.
ko: 오늘 밤 너에게 내 열쇠를 맡길게.
휴가 동안 고양이를 그에게 맡길 거예요.
그들은 내일 서류를 마리에게 맡길 거예요.

我们度假时把猫交给他照看。
他们明天会把文件交给玛丽保管。
我们把孩子托付给邻居。

佢哋聽日會將份文件交畀瑪麗保管。

ru: Сегодня вечером я доверю тебе свои ключи.
На время нашего отпуска мы доверим ihm kotа.
pt: Hoje à noite vou deixar minhas chaves com você.
Durante as férias, deixamos o gato com ele.
Amanhã vão confiar o dossiê à Marie.
Deixamos nossos filhos aos cuidados da vizinha.
